deviations_from_plan_documented: Phase A fix-up commit (f5cb355) added MatrixConfig.TestReportGlob to fix Decoupled Reusable Architecture violation + concurrent-mode misattribution (I-1)
Phase B replaced jq `.gating // "true"` shortcut with explicit `if (.gating == null) then "true" else (.gating | tostring) end` to avoid coercing boolean false to true (caught by test suite)
Phase B fixtures use `versionName = "X.Y.Z"` regex (with =) matching real app/build.gradle.kts; plan template used the no-= form
Phase B fixtures add a second commit to track evidence pack, avoiding tag.sh's dirty-tree guard preempting the gate check
Phase B dropped non-existent `--version` / `--version-code` flags from tag.sh invocations; tag.sh reads from app/build.gradle.kts
next_group_preview: Group C scope candidates (forward-looking only; not committed): network simulation per AVD, hardware-screenshot capture per row, AVD image-cache management. The next operator anti-bluff-mandate invocation will set the precedence.
